HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

Create a clean high-retention image-caption reel. When caption text is about an image, that image must appear at that moment, and it must be removed as soon as the next caption topic starts. Do not make the video messy.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.

3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

USER_INSTRUCTION:
Create a clean high-retention image-caption reel. When caption text is about an image, that image must appear at that moment, and it must be removed as soon as the next caption topic starts. Do not make the video messy.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

USER_INSTRUCTION:
Create a clean high-retention image-caption reel. When caption text is about an image, that image must appear at that moment, and it must be removed as soon as the next caption topic starts. Do not make the video messy.

Caption Style: Group captions adaptively 1-5 words, keep text inside 9:16 safe area, highlight only important words.
Visual Style: Show each image exactly when its related caption appears and remove it before next unrelated caption starts.
Background Style: sky_breeze with tasteful design layers; avoid clutter.
Segmentation Rule: New segment whenever caption focus changes to a new image topic or sentence boundary.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

USER_INSTRUCTION:
Create a clean high-retention image-caption reel. When caption text is about an image, that image must appear at that moment, and it must be removed as soon as the next caption topic starts. Do not make the video messy.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.

HARD RULES:
1) Keep only renderer-useful fields. Avoid unnecessary metadata unless used by actions.
2) Use element_id/type/source_uri from ELEMENT_COMPACT only. Never invent file paths.
3) Use op='play' for music/sfx and op='show' for visual/caption elements.
4) For captions, keep base text white and highlight ONLY important words; never tint full sentence blocks.
5) Keep caption sizes stable and 9:16 safe (avoid overflow). Prefer font_size 56-66 for base groups.
6) Use grouped captions adaptively (1-5 words) with timings aligned to transcript windows.
7) Split groups on long pause, sentence boundary (.!?), and when next word starts uppercase.
8) Group timing must be exact: start=first word start, end=next group first-word start (last uses last word end).
9) Use only supported animation refs.
10) Use only supported semantic SFX/GIF/sticker keys.
11) Keep timings within project duration and non-negative.
12) In output inter.json, do NOT include transcript payloads or word_timing_map metadata; output grouped caption actions only.
13) Use diverse palettes and backgrounds across scenes (including lighter morning-energy looks) while keeping caption contrast safe.
14) Do NOT default to grid overlays. Use plain/tint/frame/panel backgrounds unless planner explicitly asks for map/calendar/grid look.
15) Output must validate as one JSON object.
